    Method
    Description
    static String
    isValidAddress(String address, int num)
    Validates address lines with looser punctuation than names.
    static String
    isValidEmail(String email)
    Validates email structure before API calls and form submission.
    static String
    isValidName(String name, String input)
    Validates person name fields with limited punctuation support.
    static String
    isValidPhoneNumber(String phoneNum)
    Validates phone input using the desktop ten digit rule.
    static String
    isValidPostalCode(String postal)
    Validates postal code using the canonical Canadian format.
    static String
    isValidProvince(String province)
    Validates province as a two letter uppercase code.

      public Validator()

  • Method Details

    • isValidEmail

      public static String isValidEmail(String email)
      Validates email structure before API calls and form submission.
      Parameters:
      email - String value of the email to validate
      Returns:
      String with an error message if invalid. Null if valid

    • isValidPhoneNumber

      public static String isValidPhoneNumber(String phoneNum)
      Validates phone input using the desktop ten digit rule.
      Parameters:
      phoneNum - String value of the number to validate
      Returns:
      String with an error message if invalid. Null if valid

    • isValidName

      public static String isValidName(String name, String input)
      Validates person name fields with limited punctuation support.
      Parameters:
      name - String value to validate
      input - String value of the input field name
      Returns:
      error message if invalid. Null if valid

    • isValidAddress

      public static String isValidAddress(String address, int num)
      Validates address lines with looser punctuation than names.
      Parameters:
      address - String value of the address to validate
      num - int value for if it's first address line or second
      Returns:
      an error message if invalid. Null if valid

    • isValidProvince

      public static String isValidProvince(String province)
      Validates province as a two letter uppercase code.
      Parameters:
      province - String value of the province code
      Returns:
      error message if invalid. Null if valid

    • isValidPostalCode

      public static String isValidPostalCode(String postal)
      Validates postal code using the canonical Canadian format.
      Parameters:
      postal - String value of the postal code
      Returns:
      error message if invalid. Null if valid
